steps.title: Use the following sentence
steps.content: The next sentence explains the blank by saying clothing became a "widespread, familiar practice." The needed word must mean common or found widely.

steps.title: Pick the precise meaning
steps.content: Choice A means causing disagreement. Choice B means temporary. Choice D means possible, but the passage already assumes people were wearing clothing. The word meaning very common matches "widespread" and explains the shift to social significance. The answer is C.
